rulings.Case Title: CLAYTON FLOYD JR VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Pacific Gas And Electric Company To Produce Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Documents
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 29, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Pacific Gas and Electric Company to produce custodian(s) of records and person(s) most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)
